headline: Bernstein Upgrades J.M. Smucker (SJM), Raises Target to $145 on Lower Coffee Prices
summary: The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 11, Bernstein upgraded The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) to Outperform from Market Perform. It also raised its price target on the stock to $145 from $121. The firm pointed to continued deflation in green […]
